entry.title: Abandoned Avatar
entry.summary:
Author: SterekTw

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 202,072Chapters: 45/?Kudos: 278

Summary: After being tortured by Gerard Stiles gets kicked out of the pack and abonded by his friends. The sheriff sends him to his mother's brother to stay for the summer but the world is in danger and Stiles and his new friends seem to be the only ones who can save it..

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,523Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 72

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: Dying In Love
entry.summary:
Author: amatorial

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,909Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 100

Summary: After dropping out of his FBI internship, Stiles returned to Beacon Hills, struggling to outgrow the version of himself high school forced him to become. He wasn't sure what he was doing with his life, but he kept busy among the shelves at The Reading Nook, letting the quiet and routine distract him from the memories. And then Derek Hale walked in. Derek being in his life again stirred a hunger inside Stiles, a wanting that consumed him whole. It left him breathless, filled with a love so fierce it clawed at his chest and threatened to tear him apart inside.

entry.title: ᴀ ꜰʟᴏᴡᴇʀ ᴍᴀᴅᴇ ᴏꜰ ɪʀᴏɴ 🌷
entry.summary:
Author: XOLissy

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,157,247Chapters: 56/?Kudos: 88

Summary: Eden Parker has learned how to survive by staying soft in a world that punishes it. Adopted young, raised in the quiet fractures of Mystic Falls, and carrying truths no one else can see, Eden moves through life balancing grief, loyalty, and a dangerous kind of hope. He loves deeply. He trusts carefully. And he has no idea how many forces—human and otherwise—are already watching him. When new friendships form, old wounds reopen, and the supernatural begins to bleed into the ordinary, Eden finds himself at the center of something far larger than a high-school existence should allow. Monsters lurk in forests and shadows. Love arrives when it shouldn’t. Protection becomes complicated. And the past—buried, sealed, and forgotten—refuses to stay quiet. Some bonds are chosen. Some are fated. And some are forged in pain, blood, and devotion. Disclaimer: I do not own the Vampire Diaries, Supernatural, Teen Wolf, Smallville, or The Originals. I do not own any of the characters besides Eden Parker and Ben Monroe. All rights reserved to the writers. ⚠️ NOTICE: New update coming July 1st!

entry.title: The Closet
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,668Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 183

Summary: “Dude, come on! We’re late! Everyone’s already there and the trailers are gonna start soon!”Did his car break down or something? Was he expecting a ride from him?“That’s not my problem.”“Uh, kind of is!” Stiles argued. “We’re gonna miss the beginning of the movie, and won’t know what’s going on. Hurry up, let’s go!” He motioned him down yet again, and Derek scowled.“Why do you keep saying ‘we’ as if I have any intention of going anywhere with you?”“Because you are coming to this movie, or I will stay out here all night screaming.”

entry.summary:
Author: MystikCeleste

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,665Chapters: 10/39Kudos: 73

Summary: A plan that will bring together the Supernatural world of the West Coast and the Shadow World of the East Coast. Two brothers that don't know the other exists. Two groups of warriors fighting the same war on opposite sides of the country. Warriors that should know each other, but don’t. It’s time for them to meet.

entry.title: Every Flavor of You
entry.summary:
Author: ProLuna

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,816Chapters: 27/45Kudos: 55

Summary: Derek Hale is a high school student who does his best to keep to himself. Until, he ends up as Stiles Stilinski's lab partner. Derek is an unmovable object, but Stiles is an unstoppable force, and their meeting has consequences across the multiverse. This story is a love letter to Sterek Fan Fiction. It imagines that every world from every Sterek fic is real and asks what would it be like if Stiles and Derek could travel to at least some of those worlds. This is a multiverse story. There is (temporary) major character death, and universes where minor characters have long been dead. There are a lot of stopovers into non-graphic portrayals of lots of different classic AUs. This includes a brief stop in an A/B/O AU where there is brief mpreg. There are lots of other AUs they will stop in, but I wanted to list those two things in particular in case they squick anyone out so badly that even non-graphic representations of them are too much. This story was originally my 2025 NaNoWriMo project, posted on my Tumblr. It is now complete and fully edited for AO3. The essence of the story hasn't changed, but I had to do a lot of pacing and characterization edits that weren't possible at the speed of NaNo.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: By My Side
entry.summary:
Author: HyperDoctor11

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,644Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Genevive Stilinski is no ordinary mundane as she was led to believe her entire life. She learns on her eighteenth birthday that she's half-Shadowhunter and half-Demon, a Warlock. Her mother's secret. All the legends are true. Gen happens to be one of those legends. Genevive doesn't expect her baby cousin, Clary Fray's, own eighteenth birthday to blow up in their faces when Jocelyn goes missing and the two of them are taken to a Shadowhunter Institute. Gen must come to an understanding within herself about who she is and whose side she is on. On thing is for certain. Genevive's life will never go back to the way it was before.

entry.title: Chaos Come Again
entry.summary:
Author: SierraStyx

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,006Chapters: 34/?Kudos: 1,159

Summary: Stiles has a good life. He has a great job, a great husband, and he's happy in Virginia. The pack is doing fine under Scott's leadership back in California. Aside from the grisly murder scenes he sees on cases, Stiles' life is actually pretty perfect. Which is of course, when everything goes wrong.Basically Stiles is part of the BAU team, and the Nogitsune returns. Mind games ensue. There are not nearly enough crossovers where Stiles is on the team, so idk here you go, brought to you by the voices in my head. Also in this fic Stiles and Derek didn't get together until Stiles was well into college, because I think canon-era Stiles/Derek is really creepy.

entry.title: Beacon & Badge
entry.summary:
Author: akashingen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,193Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 158

Summary: Twenty years ago, Stiles Stilinski accidentally set a pencil on fire during math class and got dragged to the Hale House for Spark training. Unfortunately, the Hale family kept him. Now thirty years old, Stiles is one of the most terrifying emissaries in supernatural California. Derek Hale is Alpha of the Hale Pack and CEO of Hale Enterprises. Apparently, they’ve been emotionally married since approximately 2008. Honestly, Stiles would like it noted that none of this was his fault. Not the years of movie nights, the orange slices, the forehead kisses, the domesticity, or the fact that Derek apparently courted him using romance scenes from Jonathan Hale’s bestselling detective novels. In Stiles’s defense, Derek Hale was obviously straight, out of his league, and definitely not looking at him like a Victorian widow seeing sunlight again. Unfortunately for Stiles, literally everyone else noticed years ago.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Rust, Dust, and Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Dino_Laurus_Rex

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,009Chapters: 13/75Kudos: 24

Summary: Seven years of unspoken words, hidden truths, and a bond forged in the shadows of Beacon Hills. ​Now, hidden away in a secluded bunker, Stiles Stilinski is completely on his own, carrying a secret pregnancy that connects him forever to the Hale lineage. As he looks back on the chaotic history that brought him here, he prepares for the hardest choice of his life—and the ultimate sacrifice made out of love. _______ Or just my version of the sterek ship.

entry.title: perdí mi ojo de venado
entry.summary:
Author: dutch (itsevanffs)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,040Chapters: 4/13Kudos: 67

Summary: One thing Derek Hale has never been, will never be, is redeemable. No, he's too broken, too fucked up for that. There's too much blood on his hands: an amount that several lifetimes of baptismal water won't wash off.One thing he is, however, is lonely. And a man who convinces himself he can't get better can only get worse.

entry.title: Best Drink of my Life
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,949Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 245

Summary: The only reason he and Derek Hale had started dating after dancing around the topic for like, four years was because Derek had finally bit the bullet and asked him.He was pretty sure Derek had expected Stiles to reject him. He’d looked so tense, and so stoic while asking him that during the leadup, Stiles had been waiting for him to say someone had died. When he finally got the words out, it took a solid twenty seconds for Stiles’ brain to switch gears and realize this was good news, and Derek was just building up his defences for a negative response.Too bad for him, because Stiles had jumped him. Not sexually, but he had legitimately jumped him, wrapping both arms and legs around the older man like an octopus and demanding to know why Derek had taken so fucking long to ask.Derek had returned—after the shock wore off—that Stiles could’ve just asked him if he felt the same way, and that was when Stiles realized people were their own worst enemies sometimes. They’d both loved one another for so long, but until Derek had been brave enough to say something, neither of them had done anything about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

entry.title: Baby It's Cold Outside
entry.summary:
Author: isthatbloodonhisshirt (wasterella)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,146Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 331

Summary: [Stiles]I can’t sleep :( He knew staring wasn’t going to make Derek respond any faster—if he was even awake this time—but he kept the message open anyway, waiting. After a solid minute, he was pretty sure Derek was asleep, and was about to put his phone back down when he finally saw the three dots appear, denoting that he was typing. Waiting, he knew Derek had to be typing and deleting things, because he spent much too long typing for the two words he sent in response over thirty seconds later. [Derek]Who cares? “Wha—?” Stiles sputtered aloud, and then began to respond immediately. [Stiles]:([Stiles]don’t you care about me now?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Hell Hills
entry.summary:
Author: Loli12Blue

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,362Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Stiles knew something was wrong. The fog began to cover Beacon Hills, the animals were acting strange, and something seemed to be watching from the shadows. No one wanted to listen to him. Until the crows flew through Derek’s loft, and he seemed to have forgotten something—or someone. -------------------------------------------------------------- This is my first fanfic. I do not own the characters or Teen Wolf.
